pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: Environment & Data Validation
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: GPT-2-XL loads in FP32 with < 10GB VRAM; EasyEdit ROME module importable; CounterFact dataset loaded with >= 200 valid entries; BM25 index buildable over Wikipedia subset
pilot_tasks.fail_action: Debug dependency installation, check CUDA version compatibility, report environment diagnostics

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: ROME Editing on 100 Facts
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Editing efficacy > 75% on 100 facts AND delta_W tensors have shape (1600, 1600) AND no OOM AND mean edit time < 2s per fact
pilot_tasks.fail_action: If efficacy < 75%: check EasyEdit version, inspect layer selection, try adjusting v_lr. If OOM: reduce batch size or use gradient checkpointing.

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: TDA Gradient Computation on 100 Facts
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Within-cluster cosine > between-cluster cosine at p < 0.05 AND gradient tensors shape (1600, 1600) AND mean gradient norm > 1e-8 AND no NaN values
pilot_tasks.fail_action: If gradients are degenerate (norm < 1e-8): check loss computation, verify token alignment. If within <= between: try different loss definitions, increase top-k.

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: TECS Measurement + 5 Null Baselines on 100 Facts
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: All 5 null baselines computed AND TECS std > 1e-6 (non-degenerate) AND bootstrap CI computed AND Cohen's d value is finite
pilot_tasks.fail_action: If TECS is degenerate (all values identical): check vectorization of delta_W and g_M. If bootstrap fails: reduce to 1000 resamples for pilot.

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: Ablation on 2 Axes (top-k and weighting)
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: TECS computable for k in {5, 20} AND for BM25 vs uniform weighting AND Cohen's d variation < 30% across settings
pilot_tasks.fail_action: If variation > 30%: investigate which axis causes instability, check for degenerate cases in specific settings

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: Decomposition Validation on 100 Facts
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Spearman rho between decomposed and full TECS computable AND key/value components have finite values AND empirical null variance within 10x of 1/1600
pilot_tasks.fail_action: If rho is very low (< 0.1): the linear associative memory model may be too idealized, note this as a finding. If components have extreme values: check C matrix extraction.

pilot_schedule.note: pilot_rome and pilot_tda can run in parallel if 2 GPUs available; otherwise sequential. With 1 GPU, critical path is ~60 min.

gate_1_rome.fail: Debug EasyEdit ROME before continuing. Check: (1) correct layer index for GPT-2-XL; (2) EasyEdit version compatibility; (3) CounterFact data format.

gate_2_tda.pass: TDA gradients carry fact-specific signal; proceed to TECS
gate_2_tda.fail: TDA gradients lack fact-specificity. Options: (1) try different loss definitions; (2) increase top-k; (3) use different attribution method (TracIn instead of raw gradients). Report as finding about TDA limitations if unfixable.

gate_3_path_decision.pass: Positive path: proceed to dose-response, layer sweep, spectral analysis
gate_3_path_decision.fail: Negative path: proceed to subspace geometry, whitening decomposition, MEMIT comparison

no_go_criteria: GPT-2-XL fails to load or requires > 20GB VRAM (hardware incompatibility)
EasyEdit ROME produces 0% efficacy after debugging (fundamental implementation issue)
All TDA gradients are near-zero (gradient computation is broken)
TECS values are all identical (vectorization bug, not a scientific finding)
